_comment: Opt-in mempalace integration. Copy the mcpServers and hooks blocks into .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json for user-wide) AFTER installing mempalace: `pip install mempalace && mempalace init .`. See https://mempalaceofficial.com/guide/hooks and https://mempalaceofficial.com/reference/mcp-tools for the current, canonical command strings — replace the PLACEHOLDER values below.
